title: cestrum strigilatum var. calycinum
intro: Cestrum strigilatum var. calycinum, also known as the golden cestrum, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and provide protection against various infections. Herbal preparations of Cestrum strigilatum var. calycinum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from colds and flu to more serious conditions like tuberculosis and rheumatism.
